name: v1.4.0-beta.7 — Internal Verification Build
body:
## DIT Pro v1.4.0-beta.7

### Focus

- In-app MHL verification, card offload reliability, pause/resume recovery, Rushes Log fixes, settings/preset coverage, and update detection.
- Current stable remains v1.2.0. v1.3.0 was skipped for personal development reasons.

### Known Issues

- TC011: Apple Developer ID signing/notarization is still pending before stable.
- TC207: Windows installer path/release packaging is pending before stable.
- TC209: Windows real-device validation is pending before stable.
